new_value: Wired NRF52840_BLE stub in nrf52840_lichen.repl + t_echo.resc for full HCI/LMP responses; fixed version event params per trace. T-Echo gateway now reaches BLE ready + CoAP AUTOSTART. Renode sim verified with observable advertising. No oracles weakened.
